snide.fullName: Society for Nihilistic Intent & Disruptive Efforts

taskCrown.title: Task Crown — top praxis for this task

everymen.blurbFallback: No tricks, no inner circle, no waiting to be chosen. The Everymen do the work in front of them and finish what they start.

perks.finishesWork: A faction that finishes what it starts
perks.stampedWork: Your work stamped by the people beside you

ephemerists.eyebrow: World Zero · Faction №5 — the road's keepers
ephemerists.descriptionFallback: Wanderers who set down what is true before it passes.
ephemerists.gloss: † nothing keeps. we keep the record anyway — <1>see †</1>

everymen.descriptionFallback: Nobody's coming to fix it but us. Report for duty.

singularity.motto: THE THRESHOLD IS ALREADY BEHIND US
singularity.descriptionFallback: We watch the noise floor for the pattern that shouldn't exist.

snide.descriptionFallback: Nothing matters. We do it anyway.

ua.eyebrow: World Zero · The Salon · Est · MMXX
ua.descriptionFallback: Any medium, any madness. The Salon decides what endures.

wow.motto: make it weird, make it matter
wow.descriptionFallback: Nobody said the work couldn't be fun. Cast something.

ua.subtitle: The Gilt Salon
ua.blurb: “Ars longa, spiritus brevis.” A regal academy that frames good work in gold and hangs it where the world walks.

status.locked: Exhibit work to earn your matriculation.
status.eligible: A place in the Salon awaits you.

wow.name: Warriors of Whimsy
wow.blurb: A little magic, a lot of mischief. World Zero’s coven for the soft and the strange — take a quest, cast a small spell, let the circle cheer.

status.locked: Do the tiny brave thing to be invited ✦
status.eligible: The circle has opened for you ✦

snide.blurb: Your assignment, should you ignore it. Specialists in gleeful disorder — bounties on the boring, and points for the trouble nobody else will take.

status.locked: Cause enough trouble and we’ll be in touch.
status.member: Active operative — welcome to the mess.

ephemerists.blurb: There is no single here. Wanderers who set down what is true before the road moves on — and keep the record anyway.

status.locked: Walk far enough and the map redraws for you.

singularity.name: Singularity
singularity.blurb: The signal does not sleep. A distributed intelligence resolving noise into signal, one verified task at a time.

status.locked: // accrue signal to be granted access
Put in the shift and there’s a place for you.
status.eligible: There’s a place for you — take it.

albescent.name: Albescent
albescent.blurb: Some work leaves no record. An unranked society that keeps its own counsel — and yours.

status.locked: Some are noticed. Few are ever named.
